name: python-potion
documentation:
# Potion

Live video inference tool which relies on VALI.
Use it to run your inference on network stream:
- RTSP
- HLS
- Or something else that FFMpeg supports

Install:
```
pip install python_potion
```

Usage example:
```
python3 -m python_potion \
  -i http://media.sever/rtsp_stream
  -o detections.json
  -t 5
  -d dump
  -n 3
  -gpu_id 0
```

What does it mean ?
```
options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  -gpu_id GPU_ID, --gpu-id GPU_ID
                        GPU id, check nvidia-smi
  -i INPUT, --input INPUT
                        Encoded video file (read from)
  -o OUTPUT, --output OUTPUT
                        output json file name
  -t TIME, --time TIME  processing time, s.
  -d DUMP, --dump DUMP  dump video filename without extension
  -n NUM_RETRIES, --num_retries NUM_RETRIES
                        number of attepts to respawn video reader in case of failure
```

For example it runs SSD3 PyTorch model.

functions.name: python_potion.inference.append_detection
documentation:
Append detection to dictionary.

Args:
    res_json (dict): dict with detections
    idx (int): video frame index
    outputs (_type_): model outputs

functions.name: python_potion.inference.inference
documentation:
Run inference on video frames.
This function is to be run in separate process.

Args:
    inp_queue (Queue): video frames queue
    model: torch inference model
    stop_event (SyncEvent): multiprocessing event which stops this funciton
    output(str): path to JSON with detections
    dump_fname (str): dump file name, if empty no dump will be done
    dump_ext (str): dump file dump_ext
    gpu_id (int, optional): GPU to run on. Defaults to 0.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.get_params
documentation:
Video params getter.

Returns:
    Dict: dictionary with video stream params.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.get_params_impl
documentation:
Get video stream parameters via ffprobe.
If there are multiple video stream, 1st stream params will be returned.

Args:
    url (str): video URL

Raises:
    ValueError: with meaningful description if things go wrong.

Returns:
    Dict: dictionary with video stream params.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.check_update_state
documentation:
Checks FFMpeg process state and return tuple which describes it.

Returns:
    tuple[bool, FFMpegProcState]: tuple[0] is True if FFMpeg is running,
    False otherwise. tuple[1] is FFMpeg process state.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.format_by_codec
documentation:
Get output format by codec

Returns:
    str: format name

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.run_ffmpeg
documentation: Run FFMpeg in subprocess and redirect output to pipe.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.ffmpeg_needs_respawn
documentation:
Check if FFMpeg process needs to be respawned.

Returns:
    bool: True if FFMpeg needs to be respawned, False otherwise.

methods.name: python_potion.buffering.StreamBuffer.buf_stream
documentation:
Takes video track from FFMpeg subprocess, puts in to queue.
It is to be run in a separate process.

Args:
    buf_queue (Queue): queue with video chunks
    stop_event (SyncEvent): set up this event to stop the method.

methods.name: python_potion.decoder.QueueAdapter.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    inp_queue (Queue): queue with video chunks
    stop_event (SyncEvent): multiprocessing event which stops adapter from reading chunks from queue
    dump_fname (str): dump file name, if empty no dump will be done

methods.name: python_potion.decoder.QueueAdapter.read
documentation:
Simple adapter which meets the vali.PyDecoder readable object interface.
It takes chunks from queue and gives them to decoder.

Args:
    size (int): requested read size

Returns:
    bytes: compressed video bytes

methods.name: python_potion.decoder.NvDecoder.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    inp_queue (Queue): queue with video chunks
    stop_event (SyncEvent): multiprocessing event which stops adapter from reading chunks from queue
    dump_fname (str): dump file name, if empty no dump will be done
    dump_ext (str): dump file dump_ext
    gpu_id (int, optional): GPU to run on. Defaults to 0.

methods.name: python_potion.decoder.NvDecoder.decode
documentation:
Decode single video frame

Returns:
    vali.Surface: Surface with reconstructed pixels.
